sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43716" key="eu)e/gretos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐέγρετος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἔγρομαι, ἐγείρω</etym>) <sense id="n43716.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">easily aroused, stimulated</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πρὸς διδασκαλίαν</foreign> <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l. in</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2571.tlg001:8p.432M" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hierocl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in CA</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8p.432M.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
